description.en: A small mammal that looks like a yellow and black bumblebee-hedgehog mix.
description.zh: 一种小型哺乳动物，看起来像黄色和黑色相间的「大黄蜂刺猬」混合体。

anatomy.en: They have black and yellow stripes and many barbed quills. They use their quills to make sound by rubbing them together.
anatomy.zh: 它们有黑黄相间的条纹和许多带钩的刺。它们通过相互摩擦刺部来发出声音。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are the only mammals known to communicate by 「stridulation」 (rubbing body parts). They love eating earthworms.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是已知唯一通过「摩擦发声」（摩擦身体部位）来交流的哺乳动物。它们非常喜欢吃蚯蚓。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to the tropical lowland rainforests of northern and eastern Madagascar.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 马达加斯加北部和东部热带低地雨林特有。
